payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Lit table lamp with a beige, pleated fabric shade (scalloped lower edge) producing a warm yellow glow; dark rounded pedestal base (wood or ceramic) visible below the shade but partially cropped at the right edge of the crop; image is low-resolution and slightly blurred. Approximate distance from camera ~0.8 m.
